home.title: Welcome to home-showcase
home.description: Discover our properties and book directly with the owner.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The requested content doesn't exist or is no longer available.

location.addressHidden: The exact address is shared once your request is confirmed.

calendar.intro: The calendar below reflects current Airbnb bookings. A request on an open date doesn't reserve anything until we've confirmed it.
calendar.title: Availability

booking.airbnbNote: No online payment: your request reaches us directly, we check the dates and get back to you within 24 to 48h to arrange the details (contract, deposit).
booking.title: Booking request
booking.success: Your request has been sent. The owner will get back to you shortly.

errors.invalidRange: The check-out date must be on or after the check-in date.
errors.pastDate: The check-in date can't be in the past.
